artPrompt: A legendary goblin timekeeper mid-stride atop an overturned ballot box, draped in dangling gears and a blank smudged clockface like a breastplate, one hand sweeping a glowing minute-hand staff that trails flame-orange light, his smug grin lit from below. Foreshortened toward the viewer against a bonfire and night-black smoke, sparks and confetti frozen mid-swirl, kinetic anarchic flair. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: O'Clock, the Temporal Goblin
subtitle: Knows What Time It Is (Literally)
text:
O'Clock's power is equal to the current minute (check a clock; if it's :00, his power is 60 and he is very smug).
Whenever O'Clock attacks, deal damage equal to the current hour on a 12-hour clock. Twice as much on the half hour, because of the chime.
If it is currently a Tuesday, O'Clock has haste, double strike, and an attitude.

extras.fourthWall: the current time and day of week
extras.timingGag: only on Tuesdays; on the half hour
